_comment: Add to /azure to match the existing 'How CostSage Works' section. Resolves F10.
name: How to connect Azure to CostSage
description: Connect an Azure subscription to CostSage with a Reader RBAC role in under 60 seconds.

step.name: Sign up for CostSage
step.text: Create a free CostSage account and select Azure as the cloud target.

step.name: Deploy the ARM template
step.text: Click the one-click ARM template link. CostSage provisions a Reader-role service principal scoped to your subscription's cost and resource APIs.

step.name: Paste the service principal ID
step.text: Copy the service principal ID from the ARM output and paste it into CostSage. We never request your Azure account credentials.

step.name: Review your first Azure savings
step.text: The agent surfaces VM rightsizing, idle resources, orphaned disks, and Reserved Instance gaps within minutes. Approve any to execute.
